title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 21 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 21 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 21 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 21/03/2023
DCE iron ore futures fall today, the main contract I2305 closed 879. an decrease of 2.22% throughout the day; part of the business quotationshipping mentality turn weak. PBF at Shandong port dealt 897-906 yuan/mt; decreased 3-10 yuan/mt over yesterday.
